title: Practitioner
description: A veterinary practitioner — a licensed professional involved in patient care. Referenced by encounters, procedures, immunizations, and medication statements.

resource_type.description: Fixed resource type identifier for this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for the practitioner. UUID recommended.

license_number.description: Professional license or registration number issued by the veterinary chamber.

clinic.description: Name of the veterinary clinic or hospital where the practitioner works.

specializations.description: Areas of specialization (e.g., surgery, dermatology, dentistry).
